DescribeLLMSessions.filters: Filter list. Supported filter fields: sessionId, userId, duration (response time in ms), inputTokens, outputTokens, totalTokens, traceCount
DescribeLLMSessions.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeLLMSessions.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMSessions.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeLLMSessions.orderBy: Sort field. Default: startTime. Options: startTime, duration, traceCount, totalTokens
DescribeLLMSessions.pageSize: Number of items per page, maximum: 100
